candidate: AIMM public repositories and arXiv-linked supplementary materials

sources_checked.name: sneela/aimm-framework
sources_checked.evidence: Public repository exposes illustrative framework code plus data/sample_market_data.csv only; no positive/negative manipulation label rows found in the recursive tree.

sources_checked.name: sneela/aimm-supplementary-material
sources_checked.evidence: Public supplementary README says labels, ground truth, real market data, trading signals, feature engineering, and model weights are intentionally excluded.

sources_checked.name: AIMM arXiv page
sources_checked.evidence: Paper/supplementary metadata indicates a framework and methodology, but the public repositories do not materialize replayable labeled market-manipulation rows.

next_action: Do not count AIMM public materials as accepted Manipulation evidence unless the authors publish ground-truth positive/negative rows; continue with authenticated Dune export or another materialized direct-label dataset.
